title: alchemilla sericata subsp. rigida
intro: Alchemilla sericata subsp. rigida, commonly known as lady's mantle, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the rose family (Rosaceae) and is native to Europe. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been traditionally used to soothe and heal wounds, reduce swelling, and combat infections. The health benefits of Alchemilla sericata subsp. rigida include its ability to regulate menstrual cycles, alleviate symptoms of menopause, and support the immune system. Alchemilla sericata subsp. rigida can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in salves and creams to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
